item.title: Hitler Has Won
item.description: #genocide #HitlerHasWon happy holocaust remembrance day
item.dc:creator: Nukls

item.title: Can we post progress pics? Face gains! 482lbs to 349lbs.
item.description: Started the journey about 7 years ago at 596. Many obstacles along the way, but I persist. Edit: Holy damn! I posted this last night before bed, and between sets at the gym I happened to open Imgur. I don't knkw if any of you realize the impact you just had on my mental health. I don't have anyone in my life who gives me half the positivity that I just read through. I am on wegovy. That helped change my eating. I have struggled a lot in my journey, but I think the train finally left the station. You all are amazing people! We need this positivity all over the world. <3
item.dc:creator: Relqi

23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: The other day I posted this mug that @the9mm painted but it hadn't been glazed and fired yet and a few of you really wanted to see it after it was fired so here it is!! Please go check out her posts, she's written books and does all kinds of art and other things. Go leave her some love.
27 Man Tax: Bruce Ellenberg
“Go so far as you can see and when you get there you will always be able to see farther.” - Zig Ziglar So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Hump day funnies
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
I just like romance but trying to broaden my mind. I read lots of smart books when I was in college and school but they’re honestly weird or boring.
Backfired. Should’ve given him time to read.
This really kills the fantasy side of the story but it’s hilarious
Stay petty, potatoes.
Time to call the cops
Once again, stay petty
I did this with two cats in my rental. Don’t worry, I kept it spotless. They never knew about them
Feeling a young? Have a kid guess your age. My five year old thinks I’m 59. I am not.
Makes a hilarious story
Maybe he looks cuddly
If real, this is awesome
Maybe it’s my dairy allergy
I think people who are extremely in shape without much work are just blessed genetically
Housework is just Sisyphus for adults
Humanity never changes, technology just gets better
Even on the paleo diet, depression exists?
People moved to the American plains just to get away from humans
Why do some people have to be party poopers?
Dream life
I believe there’s something in the Bible about fallow fields. I forgot because I’m not a farmer.
This is boomer? I thought it was a complaint everyone had.
Some movies are being replayed on their anniversaries in theaters. Check it out.
I’m not super into this movie (it’s good but not necessarily my cup of tea) but this is cute
This cat has a quest. What does he want?
Give your life for theirs, I guess? Be Jesus?
Although funny, why ruin that poor bride’s wedding?
Peak girl brain
This might work on a male boss
Sorry for what I said when my hormones were going nuts
Give me a piña colada and I’ll have two blocks of cheese
Why is this so true?
My grandma once ate liver and onions in front of me, swearing they were delicious. Might as well have been crickets for how grossed out I was
Getting in your biotics
Jake Peralta, is that you?
Oops, forgot I was at the church potluck
Why yes I can!
She’s just protecting you!
Probably would scream but so cute in pictures
I think this is what my husband sees when I’m having a freak out
And I thought I was soooo cool
I just throw them out
Rich people will spend their money on anything but helping the truly needy
I know what it stands for, you don’t have to tell me
I just enjoy the possibilities
Mine are getting wise to me
Where’s the problem?
She would
Oh no!
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: It’s a scam
item.description: Just a reminder that you can’t buy the best EV in the world without paying a MASSIVE tariff (put on mostly by Biden btw) because we don’t actually care if working class people get the best products, we care about propping up a dying car industry that refuses to value the quality of product over the profits of shareholders…

item.title: This is Missy. She escaped from her backyard and ran straight to daycare, where she had a spa day and got to play with her boyfriend. Lessons were learned, but not the ones her parents probably hoped. 13/10 still a Good Girl!

item.title: Exciting times!
item.description: Sadly too far away for a good picture and the bus was pulling up. I have not seen one for years since one showed up at my window, terrorizing my cockatiels and threatening my damaged deposit

item.title: Ow and boink
item.description: #memes #socially_awesome_awkward_penguin. Hit a table on the way down from seizure and my right side of face is fucked up. Black eye, bruising, scrapes. Black eye didn’t appear until today though and it threw me backwards to my previous marriage. I’ll get over it.

item.dc:creator: LeonSpinks

item.title: Guitar
item.description:
More Simone! I am really burnt out, but I'm trying hard to make new art! Incase you don't know the story: New OC Simone! She is the lead singer in her band. After she and her band finally get their big break and sign with a label, they are introduced to the other newly signed group, only to discover that their lead singer is her ex-boyfriend. MORE CHARACTERS COMING SOON! Behind the scenes/pinup: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
Some sketches while figuring out her expressions. Want to have a clean expression sheet soon!
More Simone! I am really burnt out, but I'm trying hard to make new art! Incase you don't know the story: New OC Simone! She is the lead singer in her band. After she and her band finally get their big break and sign with a label, they are introduced to the other newly signed group, only to discover that their lead singer is her ex-boyfriend. MORE CHARACTERS COMING SOON! Behind the scenes/pinup: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

COVER ARTIST: Alex Twin
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] My Only Ghost - The Districts YouTube: https://youtu.be/zHtwUyMKXMA?si=QWr0-IMwUqIYxP-Z Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/4zf1tbzw07wGKEcSn07Hca?si=400bc7dc52b64b37

Neil D'Monte
George Rousako
Javier Benver
Kim Jaehyun
InHyuk Lee
Foundation’s Edge by Isaac Asimov
Chris Falkenberg
Danny Gardner
Fengli Lee
YM
Kyrie Escala
J Hill
MAM BA
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Even old Snapping Turtles can ruin your afternoon, keep your distance.
item.dc:creator: MissDeeMeanor

item.title: Misc Memes Vol 4
item.description: Sorry I haven't posted in a while, I doubt anyone really missed me but I've been a bit busy and overwhelmed with other life things, plus for a while there Imgur just wouldn't work. As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd Miscellaneous and Videos https://imgur.com/gallery/0k0ca7O NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: I grew this potassium ferricyanide crystal at home
item.description: Potassium ferricyanide is commonly used in cyanotype printing. Unlike what the name suggests, it's not particularly dangerous. It's also very easy to grow blood red crystals with it! If you wanna find out more, I documented the growth process here: https://crystalverse.com/potassium-ferricyanide-crystals/ While there's not much you can do with the crystal, it does 1) satisfy some primal urge for mineral collecting, and also 2) never fails to impress my friends.
item.dc:creator: crystalchase21
